untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) congestion pattern with elevated-but-not-extreme volume threshold (no congestion detector available), (2) doji candle identification (requires specific body-to-wick ratio thresholds not standardized in available indicators), (3) gapping-up event confirmation with prior resistance levels. The pattern logic combines multi-candle sequencing and volume regime detection that cannot be fully expressed with single-bar OHLC indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses small body detection (body < atr_14), tall shadows (upper_wick > body AND lower_wick > body), and gap-up confirmation (close > prev_high). However, true doji pattern recognition and congestion phase detection require multi-candle pattern matching unavailable in the indicator set. Author was silent on stop placement and profit targets; default stop set at 2.5% based on volatility, hold period at 20 days for breakout pattern.
